quotes.text: All right. Now we need to clear out the big one. I will activate the goals for Lish Llrath--that is Talon Toss for you softskins. Use them to get her attention.
Look at this Lish Llrath arena--wait, what are these birds doing here?
Me?! There is too much nature! What are you doing?
Ah! Here we are! Ahem--long ago, members of the blue dragonflight accidentally overloaded an arcane elemental and created a powerful construct named Vexamus that quickly started to wreak havoc!
What is that thing? This is your fault!
The harvest will prevail!
Your arrival is well-timed. I expect the attack to come at any moment. Before it does, let me urge the two of you to return to Bradensbrook. This doesn't need to be your fight!
I will paint this keep with your blood!
Sharpen your blades, warriors! No demon shall pass through our gates.
May your steps be sure and your catch secure.
Your corpses will spread the rot!
Killing is my business, and it's boomin'!
Hot honey, comin' atcha!
You're driving away my paying customers!
Stay close and be quiet.
Speaking with chatty nobles may reveal the spy. Just avoid drawing attention to yourself with wild accusations!
Guards! To me!
It will amuse me to watch you melt!
The wind slices to the bone!
My fire hungers! And you shall feed it.
You. No. Take. CANDLE!
Defilers... so it is you who have befouled these woods with the Nightmare.
I have faced the Nightmare before, but never has it had so thorough a stranglehold on the Dream. It hungers, desperate to seed its corruption. Do not let its whispers seduce you into madness!
My bark is worse than my bite.
C'mon now, heroes! Bring me mojo back and help me put dis old loa in him place!
Power beyond your comprehension!
Ouch! Watch what you're doing, Millificent!
You're the best, Milly! Let's never fight again!
Has-been!
Atalai, rise in service, Ahakar!
Gather 'round and place yer bets! We got a new set of vict-- uh... competitors! Take it away, Gurgthock and Wodin!
F'lakh ghet! The shadow's hunger cannot be sated!
I tire of your boorish presence. It seems I must deal with you myself.
You are no match for my power!
Begone, rebel filth!
How dare you march into MY DOCKS and so brazenly set foot on MY SHIP. Nothing will stop the Iron Horde, least of all you. Enjoy your death, weaklings. Zoggosh, man the machine turret!
Zoggosh, ready your axe. This ends now!
Help me remove the wards around the Cynosure!
Oh, and beware of the librarians. Knowledge tends to... pack a punch in these halls.
Stone and sigil show the way. One does not belong. One you must follow.
Nature is meant to be controlled. Conquered. And the Drust will conquer all!
Yay! My friends are here to play! Come along!
One of us is not like the others.
You! I wanna play with you!
Aww, are you feeling tired?
Dargrul cannot control the hammer, Ularogg! He will DESTROY Highmountain, not CONQUER it!
You dare interrupt my work?
Must I do everything myself?
Minions, do not disappoint me again!
Your death brings me no joy.
Giga... ZAP!
A stunning victory for the surface dwellers! But... we're still throwing them out with the trash!
Trash! Trash! Trash! Trash! Trash!
Thanks to Tinkmaster Overspark's leadership, the threat of world annihilation was averted.
So, you possess a modicum of skill.
I... I could not save them... Damn you, Arthas! DAMN YOU!
Behold my final work! My pride and my doom!
Intruders, you will be devoured whole!
It's time this experiment has an explosive result! Hahahaha!
Shaynemail, your training grounds fall to the intruders!
Shielded by Flame's light!
Burn by sacred flame!
As the song of their love rumbles across the fields, will it end in triumph... or tragedy? And now... on with the show!
Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to this evening's feature presentation!
Tonight... a tale of romance and rage, one which will prove once and for all if beauty is more than skin deep.
Once you get used to it, you can kill friends as easily as anyone else.
System... failure... im... mi... nent...
I have foreseen your world's doom!
Who dares attack the steed of the Huntsman?
Come Midnight, let's disperse this petty rabble!
Good work, champion. Now that you have secured the pools below, I require your aid above.
I will cast you down!
Enough! Your suffering will be a testament to the Master's wrath.
Let us begin.
You will confess, one way or another.
Full fathom five your bones shall lie!
The depths will be your tomb!
I will slice the flesh from your bones!
Surely we can come to an alternate agreement?
You struck a hard bargain. Good show!
We brought out the big guns, Captain!
Our captain is a dragon!
Get them off, get them off!
Shadows! Gather to me!
My soldiers rise once more!
No matter! My minions are endless!
Something... coming... up...
Bastion shall be laid to waste!
Have you no respect for craftsmanship?!
Imbecile! I'm the one who made you!
How vexing. Rotspew! Get to work, and don't fail me like your predecessor!
No! Now I have to rebuild those two from scratch! It seems I must take matters into my own hands.
Incompetent oafs! Goregrind! Try not to damage those limbs.
I will lead the effort here while my disciples bring you to the necropolis. Let us end this atrocity.
Your arrival proved timely, yet the battle rages on. We cannot rest until these invaders are purged from our skies.
The lift is out. If we want to keep going, we will have to go down the Stormrider way. Follow me!
Dark portals are tearing open reality, allowing shadow energy to pour into our realm. Put a stop to this, heroes!
Disrupting their efforts would benefit us all. Also, their commander here has a particular item that would be useful to me.
All whom you have slain cry out for vengeance!
My magic reaches beyond your mortal ken.
Your wanton slaughter will be returned tenfold!
More spare parts!
SMASH YOU THE PIECES!
I am... weary. You must carry on without me. I shall take my leave once my strength has returned.
You have interfered with our plans for the last time, mortals!
Don't you dare call me daughter, witch!
Blackened soul, the pitch of night, lay waste to all those in sight!
As for myself... I shall fill these halls with music until they return home. Thank you, champions.
